CustomField.formula: OR( S_D_Parameter_1__r.Is_Mandatory__c, S_D_Parameter_2__r.Is_Mandatory__c, S_D_Parameter_3__r.Is_Mandatory__c, S_D_Parameter_4__r.Is_Mandatory__c, S_D_Parameter_5__r.Is_Mandatory__c, S_D_Parameter_6__r.Is_Mandatory__c, S_D_Parameter_7__r.Is_Mandatory__c, S_D_Parameter_8__r.Is_Mandatory__c, S_D_Parameter_9__r.Is_Mandatory__c, S_D_Parameter_10__r.Is_Mandatory__c )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: True when at least one selected S&D Parameter is flagged mandatory.
CustomField.label: Has Mandatory Parameter
